    <fact>PARA vault structure initialized 2026-03-05 with Dataview and Templater plugins configured</fact>

  <narrative>IIB/MEMORY.md serves as the central state file for Columbia Transport's Second Brain system built in Obsidian. The file tracks the complete business intelligence setup including real 2025 KPI baselines calculated from sped.xlsx (4,163 shipments across 6 service types), Claude workspace configuration with 8 active skills, MCP integrations for MS365 and Slack, and business development prospects for Montreal textile market. The system uses a PARA vault structure with automated memory loading via SessionStart hook (vault-memory-loader.sh). Key business insights preserved include Export operations (Aereo + Mare) generating 87% of total margin, personnel costs at EUR 905K validated from official budget, and identification of Crosstrade Aereo as optimization target due to 9.5% margin despite 452-shipment volume. The memory file documents both completed work (MOL calculations, skill creation, MCP authentication) and pending initiatives (Montreal prospect deep-dive, Italian textile prospect list, morning briefing agent). This demonstrates a comprehensive Claude Code workspace configured for freight forwarding business intelligence with live data integration and automated knowledge management.</narrative>
